completed_tasks_this_run: Task 4 (Implementation Extraction): Added 3 prefix-preservation theorems to RaftLogAppend.lean — taa_maybeTerm_before (TAA prefix preservation, no-gap precondition), ra_prefix_preserved (P5: raftLogAppend prefix preservation), ra_committed_prefix_preserved (P4: committed prefix never overwritten). Key chain: hae → ECM1 (CandLogCoversLastIndex) → ECM2 (CandLogMatching) → ECM3 (CandidateLogCovers) → ECM4 (hqc_preserved). ECM5/ECM6: hae from ValidAEStep.

toolchain_notes: no Mathlib, stdlib only. lakefile.toml globs=[FVSquad.+*]. List.getElem?_append_left h closes (l1++l2)[i]?=l1[i]? when h:i<l1.length. simp [h] closes (l.take n)[j]?=l[j]? when h:j<n.
